iti63:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti63:2.3: Past time, future time, present time.
iti63:3.1: Perceiving in terms of signs, beings
iti63:3.4: come into the bonds of death.
iti63:5.2: peaceful, delighting in the peaceful state,
iti63:5.4: an attainer-of-wisdom makes use of classifications but can’t be classified.
